L1.summary: Qualified and motivated, but still learning the technical writing craft.

competencies.pattern_recognition: Is able to explore and understand parts of existing complex systems, navigate them and apply existing patterns, using such patterns to solve routine problems.
competencies.system_design:
Is able to focus on a given challenge and see to its resolution.

Plans isolated documentation tasks based on team requests and feedback, requiring moderate guidance.
competencies.domain_mastery: Is able to contribute to team deliverables by completing assigned writing, editing, or content maintenance tasks within scope and expected timelines, with support as needed.
competencies.ecosystem_collaboration: Proactively looks for knowledge to evolve skills.
competencies.operational_excellence: Align with your leadership additional, well-scoped tasks when possible, showing eagerness to broaden context and gradually take on more responsibility.
competencies.professional_mastery:
Is able to consume content in English as a source for the documentation process.

Is resourceful in getting answers to questions.
competencies.execution_and_delivery_reliability:
Delivers documentation within established deadlines, with moderate guidance to prioritize backlog and align expectations with stakeholders.

Works on consistently meeting deadlines for assigned tasks, improving estimation and efficiency
competencies.decision_making: Is able to complete individual tasks with moderate guidance.
competencies.expectation_management: Reports progress on tasks so that other teams involved are aligned with possible roadblocks and can assist. Requests help when necessary.
competencies.problem_framing: Is able to clearly articulate a problem after it has been explained.
competencies.strategic_influence: Understands and works on constructive feedback received and practices paying attention to the opinions of others
competencies.content_strategy: Works on developing a good mental map of the documentation under their responsibility.
competencies.editorial_governance:
Actively searches and reads existing materials, as well as team guidelines, to be able to evaluate documentation consistencies.

Identifies improvements and provides clear feedback when asked.
competencies.content_quality:
Produces clear, concise, and grammatically correct content in Portuguese, and/or English that may require supervision.

Follows up with sources and fact-checks information to guarantee clarity and contextualization.

L2.summary: Independent and organized, with impactful contributions to a product team in their track record.

competencies.pattern_recognition: Anticipates the consequences of changes to systems or solutions and plans accordingly to mitigate documentation risks.
competencies.system_design:
Able to model scalable team processes and think critically about proposed solutions.

Delivers solutions to proposed problems of a limited scope with moderate guidance.
competencies.domain_mastery:
Completes medium to large documentation projects comprising multiple tasks.

Is able to provide support for familiar and unfamiliar product/systems.
competencies.ecosystem_collaboration:
Actively collaborates with team members to deliver assigned tasks and supports new team members.

Is involved in activities that contribute to VTEX's future and are beyond their main scope of responsibility, such as hiring, chapters, mentoring, sharing new technologies, etc
competencies.operational_excellence: Identifies opportunities for improvement and drives changes in documentation processes as needed.
competencies.execution_and_delivery_reliability: Consistently meets deadlines for assigned tasks, estimating their complexity and duration correctly.
competencies.decision_making:
Understands internal team workflows and structure and is actively learning how our organization inter-operates.

Takes initiative to identify and address relevant issues aligned with team priorities, even before explicit assignment.
competencies.expectation_management: Ensures that peers and stakeholders are aware of current bottlenecks.
competencies.problem_framing: Is able to articulate own opinions and practices and to have clear conversations.
competencies.strategic_influence:
Works on promoting feedback culture in the team.

Participate actively in team's rituals.
competencies.content_strategy:
Has a refined understanding of the documentation under their responsibility and has a good mental map of the documentation under their responsibility.

Approaches documentation with a systemic mindset—planning and writing with attention to how each change impacts the broader documentation landscape.
competencies.editorial_governance: Understands and ensures coherence and consistency across our product and channels by following VTEX guidelines.
competencies.content_quality:
Produces clear, concise, and grammatically correct content in Portuguese, and/or English that may require revision.

Presents complex ideas in simple ways, combining text and imagery (infographics, diagrams...) as appropriate.

L3.summary: Skilled and productive, with complex and impactful contributions to multiple product teams in their track record.

competencies.pattern_recognition:
Able to change context on short notice to aid immediate peers and is able to quickly understand problems and opportunities outside own team.

Helps peers find patterns in their problems and achieve simplicity.

Independently evaluates trade-offs between different solutions and makes informed decisions, considering context, contraints, and impact.
competencies.system_design: Understands individual problems as opportunities to reflect on abstract classes of issues and to propose future-proof solutions
competencies.domain_mastery: Seeks an end-to-end understanding of the modules under their responsibility.
competencies.ecosystem_collaboration: Is a go-to person and acts as a resource for colleagues with less experience. Helps the onboarding process of new members by mentoring them and making it easy to integrate them in their team.
competencies.operational_excellence:
Conveys a strong sense of ownership over the team internal processes, acts as accountable for them. Actively contributes to their evolution and is willing to help in times of crisis.

Helps the team to move faster by identifying issues that slow the team down and by pursuing changes to address such issues.
competencies.professional_mastery: Learns new skills and  stays up-to-date with industry trends and tools.
competencies.execution_and_delivery_reliability:
Has a high level of productivity across projects. 

Leads the planning and execution for large content creation projects with clear goals and success metrics.

Has developed a track record of successfully completing  large scope projects.
competencies.decision_making: Works independently, and knows how to find help and guidance when faced with roadblocks.
competencies.expectation_management:
Establishes conversations with precision and integrity.

Proactively documents decisions and chooses the appropriate tools to accurately and timely communicate a project's status.
competencies.problem_framing: Is able to clearly explain technical problems with data and analysis and provide detailed feedback and solutions.
competencies.strategic_influence:
Ensures that our internal processes are well documented.

Is able to give detailed, positive and constructive feedback to their manager about the performance of other members of the team. Takes part in making the team better.
competencies.content_strategy:
Plans comprehensive documentation with a strategic mindset, making informed content strategy decisions, mapping out cross-team dependencies and articulating jobs to be done based on user research.

Has complete control of the documentation under their responsibility, with a clear understanding of all cross-team dependencies, a detailed vision of what the ideal documentation body should look like and consistent progress towards that goal.
competencies.editorial_governance: Shares ownsership in the development and evolution of VTEX guidelines.
competencies.content_quality:
Creates and revises compelling and unambiguous communication materials following VTEX guidelines.

Writes documentation requiring minimal support to ensure content quality.

L4.summary: Strategic and influential, with broad ownership and high-impact contributions across teams and documentation systems.

competencies.pattern_recognition:
Influences product and engineering planning with deep insights into user needs, surfacing documentation as a product element itself.

Anticipates long-term impacts of product decisions on content strategy and information architecture.

Is ableto revisit consolidated solutions and reinterpret constraints to tackle evolving problems from a better perspective.
competencies.system_design:
Sees patterns across the entire VTEX ecosystem and turns them into scalable, reusable content models and standards that enable consistency across products and teams.

Shapes VTEX’s documentation architecture by introducing advanced techniques (e.g., structured authoring, taxonomy frameworks) aligned with long-term product vision.
competencies.domain_mastery:
Leads the strategic direction of documentation across multiple modules.

Owns content experiences across the customer journey, bridging gaps between product, marketing, support, and education.

Deals with cross-system features with unclear ownership or overlapping scopes.

Leads the development and rollout of relevant technical projects to achieve impactful results.
competencies.ecosystem_collaboration:
Plays a critical role in helping to define the direction and goals for the team, in terms of project impact, product quality, and efficiency.

Leads cross-functional initiatives, aligning  product roadmaps and ensuring that documentation is an integral part of product success.
competencies.operational_excellence:
Works on being a reference for other teams.

Identifies team gaps and takes actions to address them.
competencies.execution_and_delivery_reliability: Leads the design and execution of the hardest part of the project or system.
competencies.decision_making:
Identifies and addresses critical business and user problems without being prompted.

Orchestrates multi-team efforts to efficiently avoid crises or to manage large structural changes.
competencies.problem_framing:
Contributes at the highest levels of product and design discussions.

Provides actionable feedback to senior stakeholders and inspires behavioral change through communication.
competencies.strategic_influence:
Acts to be a knowledge reference, sharing and mentoring teammates often.

Builds influence across leadership and executive teams.

Creates forums, rituals, or narratives that elevate the role of documentation in the company strategy.
competencies.content_strategy: Leads governance of content operations across documentation platforms, e.g. CMS/portal optimization and localization strategy.
competencies.editorial_governance: Mentors other writers and editorial staff, cultivating a culture of quality, rigor, and curiosity.
competencies.content_quality:
Translates product architecture into user-centric narratives.

Pushes the boundaries of how technical content is consumed, introducing innovative formats and experiences (e.g., interactive documentation, content automation, personalization).
